title: Immunohistochemical Staining Protocol
author: Xiao Bing Tang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kujcwun

steps.title: Slides are deparaffinized by immersion in...
steps.instruction: Slides are deparaffinized by immersion in xylene 2 times for 2 hr.

steps.title: Slides are rehydrated by immersion in 100% ethanol (10 min
steps.instruction: Slides are rehydrated by immersion in 100% ethanol (10 min.), in 95% ethanol (10 min), in 85% ethanol (10min). Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min).

steps.title: Antigen retrieval is performed by heating...
steps.instruction: Antigen retrieval is performed by heating the slides in 10 mM citrate buffer (pH 6.0) at 98°C for 10 min in a microwave oven. Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min).

steps.title: The endogenous peroxidase activity was blocked...
steps.instruction: The endogenous peroxidase activity was blocked by incubation in 3% H2O2 for 20 min. Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min).

steps.title: Antibody incubations were performed in phosphate-buffered...
steps.instruction: Antibody incubations were performed in phosphate-buffered saline (PBS) supplemented with 10% goat serum for 20 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Slides are incubated 16hr at 4°C...
steps.instruction: Slides are incubated 16hr at 4°C in a humidifying box with primary antibody. Negative controls are made with PBS alone.

steps.title: Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min)
steps.instruction: Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min).

steps.title: Slides are incubated with biotinylated secondary...
steps.instruction: Slides are incubated with biotinylated secondary antibody for 30 min in a humidifying box at room temperature.

steps.title: Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min)
steps.instruction: Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min).

steps.title: Slides are incubated with horseradish peroxidase...
steps.instruction: Slides are incubated with horseradish peroxidase (HRP)-conjugated secondary antibody (Santa Cruz Bio-technology) for 20 min in a humidifying box at room temperature.

steps.title: Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min)
steps.instruction: Slides are washed with PBS (3 times, 3 min).

steps.title: Signals were visualized by using 3...
steps.instruction: Signals were visualized by using 3 ’3Pdiaminobenzidine (DAB; Sigma, UK) for 1 minute and terminated by incubated in distilled water.

steps.title: Slides are washed with distilled water...
steps.instruction: Slides are washed with distilled water and counterstained with hematoxylin for 10 seconds.

steps.title: Slides are washed with running water for 6 min
steps.instruction: Slides are washed with running water for 6 min.

steps.title: Slides are dehydrated by immersion in...
steps.instruction: Slides are dehydrated by immersion in 70% ethanol (1 min), in 95% ethanol (5 min), in 100% ethanol (2 times, 5 min) and in xylene (2 times, 20 min).

steps.title: Cover slides are mounted with gum
steps.instruction: Cover slides are mounted with gum.
